case_title: GUY TRIGER VS. JONATHAN A. MIKHALEVSKY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JONATHAN A. MIKHALEVSKY ON NOV-01-2019 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF GUY TRIGER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY (NOW EX-WIFE - SHE REPRESENTED HER HUSBAND AND THE MOVING COMPANY ON THIS CASE INITIALLY AND HAD ORGINAL DOCUMENTATION THAT SHE SUPPLIED THE COURT. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON ALLOWED HER TESIMONTY). DEFENDANT JONATHAN MIKHALEVSKY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,127.00 FILED BY TRIGER, GUY DBA PUMA MOVING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIGER, GUY DBA PUMA MOVING CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A. $2,127.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,287.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED. FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($110 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JAN-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUGDE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A. HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF JOHNATHAN A. MIKHALEVSKY... FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A.
ORDER FOR MOTION TO VACATE - DENIED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: MOTION DENIED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/01/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). MAIL SENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED. UNABLE TO FORWARD.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN A.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: MOTION DENIED ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/01/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER DETERMINING PROPER VENUE FOR DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR MOTION TO VACATE OR FILING OF APPEAL. THE REQUESTS ARE DENIED. (MOTION TO VACATE HEARING & DENIAL OF MOTION HEARD ON NOVEMBER 1, 2019)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SC-105A ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/02/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
